# `NmiIRQ`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `p`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>NmiIRQ( );</h3>



<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Sets NMI IRQ (break) interrupt</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
	// Empty NMI (do nothing)
	interrupt nmi();
	begin
	
	end;
	
	begin
		NMIIRQ(nmi());
	end;
</code>


</div>
